nasb.text: and they implored Him that they might just touch the fringe of His cloak; and as many as touched it were cured.

esv.text: and implored him that they might only touch the fringe of his garment. And as many as touched it were made well.

cnv.text: 求耶穌讓他們只摸一摸他衣服的繸子，摸著的人就都痊愈了。

ccb.text: 求耶稣让他们摸一摸祂衣裳的穗边，所有摸过的病人都好了。

csbs.text: 恳求耶稣只要让他们摸一下他的衣服穗子。凡是摸着的人，都得了救治。
